title: gladiolus aequinoctialis var. divina
intro: Gladiolus aequinoctialis var. divina, also known as the Divine Sword Lily, is a type of plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus aequinoctialis var. divina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
